title: Manage Lab Reagent Inventory
description: A lab technician has opened a new bottle of a chemical reagent and needs to log it in the lab's inventory system.

tasks.description: Scan the barcode on the reagent bottle to identify it.
Enter the date the bottle was opened.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent records the 'date opened' in the system.

tasks.description: The system automatically calculates the new expiration date based on the 'in-use' stability period (e.g., 6 months after opening) and prints a new label.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent gets a new label with the correct in-use expiration date to place on the bottle.
